leadText: Artazon (Japanese: ボウルタウン Bowl Town) is a town in the Paldea region, located on the border of South Province (Area Three) and East Province (Area One). It is known for its flowers and art. Citizens of Artazon have a particular fondness for the Pokémon Sunflora, which is featured in traditions and art installations around the town. Though the town is primarily contained within the East Province, a small portion in the west of the settlement is part of the South Province. Because of the local Gym's specialized type, the people of this town tend to walk around accompanied by Grass-type Pokémon.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Artazon Gym 1.2 Sunflora Lawn 1.3 Chains 1.3.1 Artisan Bakery 1.3.2 Barato's 1.3.3 Chic Kebab 1.3.4 Deli Cioso 1.3.5 Every Wich Way 1.3.6 Go-For-Broke Grill 1.3.7 Kanto Crepes 1.3.8 Seabreeze Café 1.3.9 Smoochurro 1.3.10 Sugar-N-Ice 1.3.11 Sure Cans 1.4 Vending machines Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Artazon Gym [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Artazon Gym The Artazon Gym is the official Gym of Artazon. The Gym Leader is Brassius , who specializes in Grass-type Pokémon. Sunflora Lawn [ edit | edit source ] The Sunflora Lawn is a garden filled with Sunflora . Here, the player can participate in a mini-game to find Sunflora from around the town and bring them back. This mini-game also serves as the local Gym Test. Chains [ edit | edit source ] Artisan Bakery [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Artisan Bakery Artisan Bakery is a chain store that sells various sandwich ingredients and picks. It has two locations in Artazon, one along the southwestern row of buildings and another along the southeastern row of buildings. Barato's [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Barato's Barato's is a restaurant chain that sells sweet and savory foods which provide Meal Powers . It has one location in Artazon, along the northeastern row of buildings. Chic Kebab [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Chic Kebab Chic Kebab is a vending cart chain that sells grilled foods which provide Meal Powers . It has one location in Artazon, at the southeastern end of the swimming pool. Deli Cioso [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Deli Cioso Deli Cioso is a chain store that sells various sandwich ingredients . It has one location in Artazon, along the northwestern row of buildings. Every Wich Way [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Every Wich Way Every Wich Way is a restaurant chain that sells sandwiches which provide Meal Powers . It has one location in Artazon, along the southeastern row of buildings. Go-For-Broke Grill [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Go-For-Broke Grill Go-For-Broke Grill is a restaurant chain that sells various savory dishes which provide Meal Powers . It has one location in Artazon, along the southeastern row of buildings. Kanto Crepes [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Kanto Crepes Kanto Crepes is a vending cart chain that sells sweet crepes which provide Meal Powers . It has one location in Artazon, in the plaza on the eastern side of town. Seabreeze Café [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Seabreeze Café Seabreeze Café is a restaurant chain that sells light fare which provide Meal Powers . It has two locations in Artazon, one along the southwestern row of buildings and another along the northeastern row of buildings. Smoochurro [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Smoochurro Smoochurro is a vending cart chain that sells different types of churros which provide Meal Powers . It has one location in Artazon, stationed between the Gym and the swimming pool. Sugar-N-Ice [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Sugar-N-Ice Sugar-N-Ice is a vending cart chain that sells ice cream cones of various flavors which provide Meal Powers . It has four locations in Artazon: three surround the swimming pool to the south and one is stationed in front of the hedge maze to the north. Sure Cans [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Sure Cans Sure Cans is a chain store that sells sandwich ingredients , mostly fruits and vegetables. It has one location in Artazon, along the northwestern row of buildings. Vending machines [ edit | edit source ] There are several vending machines located across town: Across the street from the Artazon (West) Pokémon Center (×2) Across the street from the Artazon (East) Pokémon Center (×2) By the buildings in the western plaza (×2) By the swimming pool Vending machines Fresh Water $ 200 Soda Pop $ 300 Lemonade $ 350
